hero.name: Santiago Cardona
hero.summary: Full Stack Developer with experience building end-to-end digital solutions, contributing to both technical development and continuous product improvement. Adaptable to different environments and technologies, focused on delivering results with a strong learning mindset.

hero.greeting: Hi there! Welcome to my portfolio!
hero.summary: Full Stack Developer with experience building end-to-end digital solutions, contributing to both technical development and continuous product improvement. Adaptable to different environments and technologies, focused on delivering results with a strong learning mindset.

about.title: Who I am
paragraphs: Full Stack Developer experienced in building scalable and maintainable software solutions across frontend and backend.
Strong ability to adapt to new technologies and environments, contributing to product improvement and delivery efficiency.
Focused on continuous learning and working effectively in dynamic, fast-paced teams.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained RESTful APIs using .NET 7 and Entity Framework Core.
Designed layered architecture using Repository and Service patterns with SQL Server.
Built frontend applications with React 18, TypeScript, and Vite.
Managed state with Redux Toolkit and routing with React Router.
Developed UI components using Material UI and SCSS.
Integrated APIs using Axios and handled forms with React Hook Form and Yup.
Implemented internationalization with i18next and authentication with Azure AD using MSAL.
Used AG Grid, Storybook, and quality tools such as ESLint and Stylelint.
Developed and maintained REST APIs using .NET and Entity Framework.
Worked with SQL Server databases and optimized queries.
Implemented backend logic following clean architecture principles.
Collaborated in full stack development and system integration.
Developed and maintained REST APIs using Java Spring Boot and Express.js.
Containerized applications using Docker.
Deployed services using OpenShift.
Implemented unit testing with Jest and API documentation with Swagger.
Developed frontend components using React and Redux.
Worked with UI libraries such as Material UI, Bootstrap, and Ant Design.
Built REST APIs using Express.js, NestJS, and Spring Boot.
Designed SQL and NoSQL database schemas and queries.
Managed IT procurement orders and operational processes.
Automated workflows using Python and Visual Basic.
Built PowerBI dashboards for data analysis.
Modeled business processes using BPMN.
Developed APIs using Express.js.
Implemented authentication using JWT and UUID.
Designed NoSQL schemas with MongoDB.
Configured CI/CD pipelines using DigitalOcean.

contact.title: Let’s work together
contact.summary: Open to new opportunities. Reach out via email or connect on LinkedIn.

hero.summary: Desarrollador Full Stack con experiencia construyendo soluciones digitales de punta a punta, aportando tanto al desarrollo técnico como a la mejora continua del producto. Me adapto con facilidad a distintos entornos y tecnologías, con enfoque en resultados y aprendizaje constante.

about.title: Quién soy
paragraphs: Desarrollador Full Stack con experiencia en la construcción de soluciones escalables y mantenibles tanto en frontend como en backend.
Gran capacidad de adaptación a nuevas tecnologías y entornos, contribuyendo a la mejora del producto y a la eficiencia de entrega.
Enfocado en el aprendizaje continuo y en colaborar eficazmente en equipos dinámicos y de ritmo acelerado.

responsibilities: Desarrollé y mantuve APIs RESTful con .NET 7 y Entity Framework Core.
Diseñé arquitectura por capas usando patrones Repository y Service con SQL Server.
Construí aplicaciones frontend con React 18, TypeScript y Vite.
Gestioné estado con Redux Toolkit y enrutamiento con React Router.
Desarrollé componentes UI con Material UI y SCSS.
Integré APIs con Axios y manejé formularios con React Hook Form y Yup.
Implementé internacionalización con i18next y autenticación con Azure AD usando MSAL.
Utilicé AG Grid, Storybook y herramientas de calidad como ESLint y Stylelint.
Desarrollé y mantuve APIs REST usando .NET y Entity Framework.
Trabajé con bases de datos SQL Server y optimicé consultas.
Implementé lógica backend siguiendo principios de arquitectura limpia.
Colaboré en desarrollo full stack e integración de sistemas.
Desarrollé y mantuve APIs REST con Java Spring Boot y Express.js.
Contenericé aplicaciones usando Docker.
Desplegué servicios con OpenShift.
Implementé pruebas unitarias con Jest y documentación de API con Swagger.
Desarrollé componentes frontend con React y Redux.
Trabajé con librerías UI como Material UI, Bootstrap y Ant Design.
Construí APIs REST con Express.js, NestJS y Spring Boot.
Diseñé esquemas y consultas para bases de datos SQL y NoSQL.
Gestioné órdenes y procesos de compras TI.
Automaticé flujos de trabajo con Python y Visual Basic.
Construí tableros PowerBI para análisis de datos.
Modelé procesos de negocio usando BPMN.
Desarrollé APIs con Express.js.
Implementé autenticación con JWT y UUID.
Diseñé esquemas NoSQL con MongoDB.
Configuré pipelines CI/CD usando DigitalOcean.

about.title: Quem sou eu
paragraphs: Desenvolvedor Full Stack com experiência na criação de soluções escaláveis e sustentáveis tanto no frontend quanto no backend.
Grande capacidade de adaptação a novas tecnologias e ambientes, contribuindo para a melhoria do produto e a eficiência das entregas.
Focado em aprendizado contínuo e em colaborar bem com equipes dinâmicas e de ritmo acelerado.

responsibilities: Desenvolvi e mantive APIs RESTful com .NET 7 e Entity Framework Core.
Desenhei arquitetura em camadas usando padrões Repository e Service com SQL Server.
Construí aplicações frontend com React 18, TypeScript e Vite.
Gerenciei estado com Redux Toolkit e roteamento com React Router.
Desenvolvi componentes UI com Material UI e SCSS.

Implementei internacionalização com i18next e autenticação com Azure AD usando MSAL.

Desenvolvi e mantive APIs REST usando .NET e Entity Framework.
Trabalhei com bancos de dados SQL Server e otimizei consultas.
Implementei lógica de backend seguindo princípios de arquitetura limpa.
Colaborei no desenvolvimento full stack e na integração de sistemas.
Desenvolvi e mantive APIs REST com Java Spring Boot e Express.js.
Containerizei aplicações usando Docker.
Implantei serviços com OpenShift.
Implementei testes unitários com Jest e documentação de API com Swagger.
Desenvolvi componentes frontend com React e Redux.
Trabalhei com bibliotecas UI como Material UI, Bootstrap e Ant Design.

Modelei esquemas e consultas para bancos de dados SQL e NoSQL.
Gerenciei pedidos e processos de compras de TI.

Criei dashboards no PowerBI para análise de dados.
Modelei processos de negócio usando BPMN.
Desenvolvi APIs com Express.js.

Configurei pipelines de CI/CD usando DigitalOcean.
